color: rgb(37, 49, 60) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 测试图像 x

div.style: color: rgb(37, 49, 60) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
物体无关提示
normal / abnormal

div.style: color: rgb(36, 68, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CLIP 视觉编码器
冻结

div.style: color: rgb(36, 68, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CLIP 文本编码器
冻结

div.style: color: rgb(36, 68, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
多层 patch 特征
F¹...Fᴸ

div.style: color: rgb(36, 68, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
固定文本原型
tₙ, tₐ

div.style: color: rgb(41, 69, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
锚点层选择
last 或多层 mean

div.style: color: rgb(41, 69, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
归一化 patch tokens
F={fᵢ}, H×W×C

div.style: color: rgb(41, 69, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
与固定文本原型相似度
[〈fᵢ,tₙ〉,〈fᵢ,tₐ〉]/τ

div.style: color: rgb(41, 69, 95) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
初始异常概率
S₀(i)=softmax(logitsᵢ)ₐ

div.style: color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
tokens 重排为特征网格
B×C×H×W

div.style: color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
2×2 Haar 分解
LL, LH, HL, HH

div.style: color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
高频能量
HF=mean_c(|LH|+|HL|+|HH|)

div.style: color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
低频结构边界
LF-edge=||∇LL||

div.style: color: rgb(36, 91, 72) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Boundary-aware 可靠性
W=HF·(1−LF-edge)
逐图归一化

div.style: color: rgb(107, 80, 22) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
语义证据
qₐ=S₀^γ
qₙ=(1−S₀)^γ

div.style: color: rgb(107, 80, 22) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
频谱调制
rₐ=(1−λ)+λW
rₙ=(1−λ)+λ(1−W)

div.style: color: rgb(107, 80, 22) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
patch 权重
ωₐ=qₐ·rₐ^η
ωₙ=qₙ·rₙ^η

div.style: color: rgb(103, 67, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
分别按 ωₐ / ωₙ
选择 top-k patch

div.style: color: rgb(103, 67, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
加权平均并 L2 归一化
异常原型 vₐ
正常原型 vₙ

div.style: color: rgb(103, 67, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
top-k 权重均值
置信度 cₐ, cₙ

div.style: color: rgb(115, 58, 49) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
更新门控
m=1[cₐ ≥ update_min_conf]
mₐ=1[cₐ ≥ max(τₐ, update_min_conf)]

div.style: color: rgb(115, 58, 49) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
更新率
α=α₀·cₐ·m
β=β₀·cₙ·m

div.style: color: rgb(115, 58, 49) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
验证配置
α₀=0，β₀ 较小
异常原型通常保持固定

div.style: color: rgb(115, 58, 49) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
t̃ₙ=norm((1−β)tₙ+βvₙ)
t'ₐ=norm((1−α)tₐ+αvₐ)
t̃ₐ=mₐ·t'ₐ+(1−mₐ)·tₐ

div.style: color: rgb(115, 58, 49) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
逐图校准文本原型
t̃ₙ, t̃ₐ

div.style: color: rgb(69, 55, 98) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
各选定层重新打分
Fˡ × [t̃ₙ,t̃ₐ] / τ

div.style: color: rgb(69, 55, 98) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
softmax 异常概率
恢复 patch 网格并上采样

div.style: color: rgb(69, 55, 98) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
多层融合
sum 或 mean

div.style: color: rgb(69, 55, 98) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 最终像素异常图 A(x)
